examples: He was a common figure in the streets and lived in some shabby neighborhood of tenement houses where there were hens and chickens among the cobblestones.
In Rome, for example, most of the people lived in insulae, great tenement blocks that were often ten stories high.
The great photographer posed them in front of a row of tenement.
See the tenement style bathroom, with the shower and toilet in two different rooms.
Rents were cheap in the crumbling tenement blocks in Prenzlauer Berg, Mitte and, later, Friedrichshain.
